testcase.name: test_system_logs_access
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_uat_p0_blockers.py:261: in test_system_logs_access assert response.status_code == 200, f"System logs access failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: System logs access failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
